narrative:
Hanover Twp 5 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,027 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.7 percentage points.
